How we work

How your vision comes to life.

A clear process, from first visit to handover.

STEP 01

Site visit

Start with our project intake form, then we walk the property together and talk through your vision.

STEP 02

The plan

A costed, scoped plan before anything is dug up, with a full landscape design available if you'd like one.

STEP 03

The build

Every Beck's Landscaping crew builds to the same standard, start to finish.

STEP 04

Handover

A finished space, ready for real life.

Working with us

What you receive.

  • 1
    A clear brief

    We walk the property together at the site visit and talk through your vision.

  • 2
    A costed plan

    One plan, scoped and priced, before anything is dug up.

  • 3
    Updates as we build

    Photos and notes from the crew as your project moves through each stage.

  • 4
    A finished handover

    A walkthrough of the finished space, ready for everyday life.
